Note that the care level status source variable from DE identifies five levels of care: hospital, inpatient 
psychiatric facility for individuals under age 21, nursing facility, intermediate care facility, or other type 
of facility. Each of these levels is included in MMLEADS. In addition, the MDCD_CARE_LEVEL_MOS
